segments.speaker: 题目21/22
segments.text: Listen to a school radio announcement. attention students, we apologize for the unions caused by the recent changes to our work study program application process. Unfortunately, due to system issues, some applications were not processed properly. We are working to resolve this problem as quickly as possible. Please resubmit your applications through the updated portal and phone the career center if you encounter any further issues. Additionally, were pleased to announce several new part time work opportunities available on campus to stop by the center to learn more.
